code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut src = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while src.len() > 0
    match list.min(src)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      src = remove_first(src, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws_byte(byte_or_zero(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws_byte(byte_or_zero(input, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(nums, v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

let sorted = sort_asc(nums)
mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = sorted.len()
while j < m
  match sorted.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
